scenario_summary: Synthetic adversary-pair challenge case created specifically for SilentWitness evaluation to avoid LLM memorization bias. Evidence artifacts and ground-truth answers will be provided when Epic 15 ships. The scorer and runners skip this dataset gracefully when the sha256 placeholder is detected.
memorization_risk_note: Synthetic dataset with no prior public disclosure. LLM memorization risk is low by design — the case-trapdoor is constructed to contain novel artifacts not present in any training corpus.
notes: Filled by Epic 15 if optional adversary-pair epic ships; harness skips gracefully when sha256 is the placeholder.
